title: Muddy Pigs
description: A Datapack and Rescource pack that adds Muddy Pigs in the Swamp Biomes
body:
# What it does
This pack adds Muddy Pigs from Minecraft Earth. They can only be found in the Swamp Biomes, by eather breeding there or natrual spawning.

# How to install as Datapack
(When using the Mod Version you only need to add the Mod)
- Unzip the 'MuddyPigs.zip'
- Add the Folder in your Resource Packs Folder
- When creating a world add the Folder as Datapack
